support.notes: This profile records candidate integration paths only. Open Voice Bridge does not currently support DJI Mic 2.

transports.notes: DJI officially documents connecting the receiver to a computer by USB-C. Device enumeration and channel behavior must be verified on each desktop platform.
Do not assume generic desktop Bluetooth support. DJI's direct-transmitter Bluetooth compatibility list names selected DJI devices and smartphones, not desktop operating systems.

protocols.notes: No undocumented Bluetooth or control protocol is claimed or implemented.

platforms.notes: Start with receiver-over-USB audio enumeration; Bluetooth is a separate research path.
